source_name: WA petroleum royalty and North West Shelf grant receipts
notes: Manual extract from WA Overview of State Taxes and Royalties 2025-26. The value sums Petroleum - State component royalties and North West Shelf grants; iron ore lease rentals shown near the source table are excluded.
source_rights: Government of Western Australia copyright and website terms
citation: Government of Western Australia, Overview of State Taxes and Royalties 2025-26, summary tables.

fields.source_note: Source summary table states total royalties exclude North West Shelf grants, which were $642.2 million in 2024-25. Petroleum - State component royalties were $17.9 million.
